from typing import List, Dict, Any

def add_item(items: List[str], item: str) -> List[str]:
    items.append(item)
    return items

def update_config(config: dict, key: str, value: Any) -> dict:
    config[key] = value
    return config

def register_user(users: dict, user_id: str, name: str) -> dict:
    users[user_id] = {"name": name, "active": True}
    return users

def process_batch(batch: list, new_items: list) -> list:
    batch.extend(new_items)
    return batch

def merge_settings(base: dict, overrides: dict) -> dict:
    base.update(overrides)
    return base
